fixes.rationale: Require the nested-key length array before registering lazy C nested-key access logging so non-NUL-terminated buffers are never formatted via strlen fallback.
Delegate AccessRecorderKey sampling through the AccessKeyType entrypoint so both access-sampling paths share one decision ladder.
Record the Expire access result before returning from the ExpireFromMaster error path, preserving failure access/performance logs.

skipped.reason: Fixing sampled-out ObjectAccessRecorder construction cost requires changing object state ownership/lazy storage across the facade, not a safe single-line or small contiguous suggestion.
